overall.description: Gameplay footage from a truck driving simulator using the GTA V engine, showing a first-person perspective from inside a semi-truck cabin. The vehicle drives across a large green suspension bridge in Los Santos with moderate traffic, featuring detailed cabin interiors and realistic vehicle physics. The clip transitions from the bridge approach to crossing the span and exiting into a commercial urban district.

agents.ego_description: driving a semi-truck in moderate highway traffic approaching a large green suspension bridge

notable_agents.action: semi-truck traveling in the left lane parallel to ego vehicle

entered.detail: large green steel suspension bridge with tall towers spanning across the highway
truck instrument panel with digital displays and steering wheel
left side rearview mirror reflecting traffic behind
metal guardrails along both sides of the highway
chain link fence running along the right side of the bridge approach

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view from inside a truck cabin driving on a multi-lane highway. The vehicle approaches a distinctive green suspension bridge in the distance while surrounded by moderate traffic. The dashboard and side mirrors are visible in the foreground, with guardrails lining both sides of the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: suspension bridge deck with cable towers

events.description: camera pans right to look out the side window at the bridge structure and city skyline
ego vehicle overtakes a red car on the left side

agents.ego_description: driving across the bridge while briefly looking at the side view, then overtaking a red sedan

notable_agents.action: red sedan being overtaken by the ego truck

entered.detail: green steel tower of the suspension bridge with cable attachments
distant urban buildings visible through the bridge cables
thick steel suspension cables supporting the bridge deck
metal safety railing along the edge of the bridge deck

segments.scene_description: The truck drives onto the bridge deck, passing under the suspension cables. The camera briefly pans right to reveal the bridge tower structure and distant city skyline before returning forward. The vehicle overtakes a red sedan on the left while continuing across the span.

scene_state.functional_zone: suspension bridge deck approaching second tower

events.description: ego vehicle overtakes a large white semi-truck on the left

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed across the bridge, overtaking a white semi-truck in the left lane

notable_agents.action: white semi-truck with trailer being overtaken by ego vehicle

entered.detail: commercial buildings visible beyond the bridge fence on the right
roadside sign with 'Los Santos' text visible on the left side
second green steel tower at the far end of the suspension bridge

segments.scene_description: Continuing across the bridge deck, the truck overtakes a large white semi-truck on the left. A 'Los Santos' sign is briefly visible on the left side, and the second bridge tower appears ahead. Commercial buildings line the right side beyond the bridge railing.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban highway exiting bridge with commercial buildings

events.description: exits the suspension bridge onto the urban highway with buildings on both sides

agents.ego_description: driving off the bridge into a commercial district with modern office buildings visible

entered.detail: tall glass and steel office building with reflective windows
palm trees visible along the right side of the highway
metal guardrails returning along the sides of the urban highway

segments.scene_description: The truck exits the suspension bridge and enters an urban highway environment. Modern glass office buildings line the left side of the road, while palm trees and commercial structures appear on the right. The vehicle continues driving on the multi-lane highway toward an overpass, with guardrails returning along the road edges.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from inside a truck cabin as it transitions from a multi-lane highway onto a massive green suspension bridge. It begins with the vehicle approaching the bridge in the distance, framed by the detailed dashboard and side mirrors while navigating through moderate traffic. As the truck moves forward, the scene shifts from the open highway to the bridge deck, passing directly under the towering suspension cables. The camera briefly pans right to reveal the bridge's structural tower and the distant city skyline before returning to the road to overtake a red sedan. The movement finally settles into a steady drive across the span, with the guardrails and bridge architecture framing the path toward the city.

The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective as a semi-truck transitions from the open span of a suspension bridge into a dense urban highway. It begins with the vehicle overtaking a large white semi-truck on the left, passing a Los Santos sign as the second bridge tower looms ahead and commercial buildings line the distant right. As the truck leaves the bridge deck, the open railing gives way to highway guardrails and the environment shifts into a city landscape. The scene then expands into a multi-lane corridor flanked by modern glass office buildings on the left and palm trees on the right, before finally proceeding toward a looming overpass.
